component.name: Accelerated Crypto Primitives for Series-2 devices
RAIL Library, Radio Configurations for Modules
Device compatibility defines for Bluetooth features

pedigree.notes: Software for cryptography offload to hardware, IP from Secure-IC, previously Barco-Silex.

component.name: IO Stream: Common code for UART-type streams
Power Manager: Deepsleep with blocking on HFXO restore
RAIL Library, Single Protocol for Alpha Chips
Bluetooth Core Crypto Configuration for Controller
Drivers for Silicon Labs Crypto Acceleration
RAIL Utility, Built-in PHYs Across HFXO Frequencies (RAIL 3)
RAIL Library, Single Protocol Internal Chips Dummy
System adaptation layer used by the Bluetooth host stack
NVM3 back-end for default instance in flash

pedigree.notes: The CMSIS is a set of tools, APIs, frameworks, and work flows
